description: The open-PR fixture reproducing the 2026-07-12 incident geometry (docs/specs/duplicate-build-guard.md §0/§4): PR #1458 is IN FLIGHT, ADDING the census substrate file src/data/provenanceCoverage.ts — the census does NOT exist on the fixture main. Injected via the test's fixture adapter; no gh, no network.

pr.title: LLM-Decision Quality Meter — uniform provenance + outcome grading (ACT-1193/1194)
pr.body: Records provenance for every LLM decision point: a census ratchet over decision points so a new LLM decision that skips provenance fails CI. Each enrolled callsite writes a decision_quality row with verdict, model, and outcome so gates can be graded. Adds the provenance coverage census file and wires the first decision points.
